# HBCU Yard Pass

HBCU Yard Pass is a digital membership platform that fuses HBCU culture, community pride, and financial empowerment into one powerful savings experience. It connects the entire HBCU ecosystem — students, alumni, faculty, Greek organizations, and families — to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide. Beyond savings, it serves as a community investment tool that supports HBCU institutions, scholarships, and cultural initiatives. The brand carries a strong sense of legacy, school pride, and economic empowerment, celebrating HBCU traditions like Homecoming, football classics, and step shows while delivering real everyday value.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Save Big, Rep Your HBCU — HBCU Yard Pass

URL: https://example.com
Description: HBCU Yard Pass connects students, alumni, and families to thousands of retail savings nationwide. Fuse culture, pride, and financial empowerment — join today!

Save Big, Rep Your HBCU — HBCU Yard Pass

The Official HBCU Membership Portal




# Your Pass to Pride, Savings & Legacy








### Connect the entire HBCU ecosystem to tens of thousands of nationwide discounts, exclusive lifestyle benefits, and a culturally rooted digital membership — celebrating every Homecoming, Classic, and step show along the way.





Get Your Yard Pass


Explore Benefits






Save more. Experience more. Represent proudly.





















What Is HBCU Yard Pass?



## More Than a Membership.A Digital Experience Built for the HBCU Community.


The Official HBCU Yard Pass is an interactive web-based savings and lifestyle portal designed specifically for students, alumni, faculty, staff, families, supporters, and organizations across the entire HBCU ecosystem. It connects every member of the community to a powerful nationwide savings network — providing access to exclusive discounts and benefits at tens of thousands of participating businesses across America.


More than just a membership card, the HBCU Yard Pass is a digital platform created to celebrate HBCU culture while helping members save money on the products, services, experiences, and everyday purchases they already enjoy. Whether attending Homecoming, traveling to football classics, dining with friends, or planning family vacations — your pass works wherever you go.









### Culture-Connected Savings


Every discount, deal, and benefit is curated with HBCU pride at its core — from Homecoming weekends and Greek organization events to everyday retail, dining, and travel savings that resonate with your lifestyle.












### Digital Access Anywhere


Once enrolled, members receive immediate access to the HBCU Yard Pass interactive web portal and mobile-friendly savings platform. Log in, browse thousands of participating merchants, and start saving instantly — no physical card required.












### Pride with Practical Value


The program combines school pride, community investment, lifestyle benefits, and financial savings into one seamless membership experience — supporting HBCU institutions, scholarships, and cultural initiatives while delivering real everyday value.














50K+
Participating Merchants































The Numbers Speak

## One Pass.Endless Value.


From in-person dining to online shopping, travel, entertainment, and everyday services — your HBCU Yard Pass works wherever life takes you.









50K
+


### Participating Merchants Nationwide


Access tens of thousands of businesses across America — local favorites and national brands alike.






15
+


### Lifestyle Categories


Dining, travel, retail, entertainment, health, beauty, automotive, and more — savings built around how you actually live.






100
%


### Mobile-Friendly Access


No app download required. Log in from any device and start saving instantly — at Homecoming, on the road, or at home.






365


### Days of Year-Round Savings


Football classics, step shows, everyday errands — your pass never sleeps. Real value every single day of the year.









Members use the HBCU Yard Pass interactive portal for in-person purchases, online shopping, travel bookings, dining experiences, entertainment outings, and everyday services — with no complicated process, no clipping coupons, and no barriers. Just log in, search, and save while proudly representing the HBCU legacy.



















Savings Categories

## Save on Everything That Matters to You


From everyday essentials to once-in-a-lifetime moments — Homecoming weekends, football classics, family vacations, and the retail and dining experiences you enjoy every day — the HBCU Yard Pass delivers real savings across every corner of your lifestyle.













### Restaurants & Dining


Unlock exclusive discounts at thousands of restaurants, fast-casual spots, and local eateries nationwide — whether you're grabbing a bite on campus or dining out with family.


Everyday Essential










### Retail Shopping


Shop smarter at major national retailers and local boutiques. From apparel and electronics to home goods and gifts — your membership turns everyday retail into a savings opportunity.


Everyday Essential










### Hotels & Resorts


Book with confidence at premium hotels and resorts across the country. Whether it's Homecoming weekend or a family getaway, your Yard Pass unlocks preferred rates at top properties.


Big Moments










### Flights & Travel


Explore travel deals and low-cost flights to football classics, Greek conventions, and family reunions. Your membership helps the entire HBCU community move together and save together.


Big Moments










### Entertainment & Attractions


From theme parks and concerts to step shows, sporting events, and cultural experiences — access exclusive member pricing on the moments that define HBCU community life.


Big Moments










### Entertainment & Attractions


From theme parks and concerts to step shows, sporting events, and cultural experiences — access exclusive member pricing on the moments that define HBCU community life.


Big Moments







### Automotive & Technology


Save on car rentals, maintenance services, and the latest tech products. From getting to the classic to staying connected on campus — your Yard Pass has you covered.


Everyday Essential









Tens of thousands of participating merchants. One powerful membership.


Get Your Yard Pass





























Your Yard. Your Legacy. Your Savings.

## Unlock Every Perk Your Legacy Deserves — HBCU Yard Pass

URL: https://example.com/features
Description: Explore powerful retail discounts, low cost flights, and exclusive member perks built for the entire HBCU ecosystem. Your savings journey starts right here — discover every feature!

Unlock Every Perk Your Legacy Deserves — HBCU Yard Pass

How It Works

## Your Pass to Savings Starts Here


The HBCU Yard Pass is a mobile-friendly digital savings platform built for the entire HBCU ecosystem — from enrollment to everyday redemption, it's effortless.









## From Enrollment to Everyday Savings — Instantly.


Once enrolled, members receive immediate access to the HBCU Yard Pass interactive web portal — a mobile-friendly savings platform designed to work seamlessly from your smartphone, tablet, or computer.


Browse and search thousands of discounts and offers available locally and nationwide. Simply log in, find participating merchants or categories, and begin using available savings instantly. No waiting, no complicated steps — just real value for the HBCU community, right when you need it.


Whether you're heading to Homecoming, traveling to a football classic, dining with friends, or shopping online, the HBCU Yard Pass puts your savings to work everywhere you go.

Get Your Yard Pass








01



### Join and Access


Enroll in minutes and receive immediate access to the HBCU Yard Pass web portal. Your membership activates instantly — no delays, no waiting period. Log in from any device and your savings world opens up right away.










02



### Browse Local and Nationwide Offers


Explore tens of thousands of participating merchants across America. Search by category, location, or merchant name to find the deals that matter most to you — from dining and travel to retail and everyday essentials.










03



### Use Savings with Ease


Redeem your discounts directly from your smartphone, tablet, or computer — no physical card required. Show your digital pass at checkout or apply savings online. It's that simple, every time.


























Membership Perks



## Everything You Need.One Pass. Zero Paper Coupons.


The HBCU Yard Pass gives you instant access to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide — in-store, online, and everywhere in between. Log in, search, and start saving. No clipping. No waiting. No limits.













### In-Person Purchases


Flash your digital pass at thousands of local and national retailers. From campus bookstores to major chains, your savings activate the moment you walk in — no paper required.


- Retail Stores

- Apparel & Gear

- Health & Beauty












### Online Shopping


Shop your favorite brands from anywhere. Access exclusive promo codes, cashback offers, and member-only deals through the Yard Pass portal — delivered straight to your screen.


- E-Commerce

- Promo Codes

- Cashback Offers












### Travel Reservations


Heading to Homecoming or a football classic? Save on hotels, car rentals, and travel reservations so you can represent your school without breaking the bank. Your HBCU journey, fully covered.


- Hotels & Lodging

- Car Rentals

- Flights & Packages












### Dining Experiences


From post-game celebrations to alumni brunches, enjoy discounts at restaurants, fast-casual spots, and local favorites. Dine with your crew and let the Yard Pass pick up the difference.


- Restaurants

- Fast Casual

- Local Favorites












### Entertainment Activities


Score savings on concerts, sporting events, step shows, movies, and more. Whether you're in the stands or on the yard, your membership amplifies every experience.


- Concerts & Events

- Sports Tickets

- Movies & Shows












### Everyday Services


The savings don't stop at the fun stuff. Access discounts on insurance, auto services, wellness, subscriptions, and professional services — the everyday essentials that add up fast.


- Auto & Insurance

- Wellness & Fitness

- Subscriptions












Instant access. Nationwide reach. One powerful membership for the entire HBCU ecosystem.

Get Your Yard Pass


















Your Pass. Your Savings.

## Save on Everything That Moves You


The HBCU Yard Pass connects you to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide — so whether you're heading to Homecoming, rolling out for a football classic, or just living everyday life, your membership works hard so your wallet doesn't have to.


From dining and travel to retail and entertainment, every experience you already enjoy becomes an opportunity to save. Log in, search, and start using discounts instantly — no clipping coupons, no complicated redemption.



- Homecoming & Football Classics Hotels, flights, car rentals, and dining near the yard — all with member savings.

- Step Show Weekends & Greek Events Apparel, entertainment, and event-night dining — represent and save.

- Online Shopping & Retail Exclusive discounts at popular online retailers — everyday purchases, elevated savings.

- Family Travel & Vacations Plan family trips with access to low cost flights, hotels, and experiences nationwide.

- Dining Out & Student Life Restaurants, campus-area spots, and everyday household essentials — covered.



Explore All Member Benefits

The HBCU Ecosystem

## Built for Every Corner of the Community


The HBCU Yard Pass strengthens connections across the entire HBCU ecosystem — delivering real savings, cultural celebration, and community investment year-round, for everyone who carries the legacy forward.














### Current Students


Maximize every dollar on campus, off campus, and everywhere in between.












### Alumni


Stay connected to your alma mater while saving on life's everyday moments.












### Faculty & Staff


Exclusive benefits that honor the educators and administrators who shape HBCU excellence.












### Greek Organizations


Represent your letters and your legacy — savings for the entire chapter, year-round.












### Families & Friends


Travel to Homecoming, football classics, and step shows while saving every step of the way.












### HBCU Supporters


Celebrate the culture and invest in HBCU institutions, scholarships, and initiatives.












### Community Leaders & Corporate Partners


Align your brand with HBCU culture and drive meaningful economic empowerment across the nationwide network.









No matter where you stand in the HBCU community, the Yard Pass was built with you in mind — a platform that celebrates pride, fosters connection, and delivers tangible financial savings every single day.

















Ready to Join the Movement?

The HBCU Yard Pass is built for every member of the HBCU ecosystem — students, alumni, faculty, Greek organizations, and families. Whether you're exploring partnership opportunities, supporting HBCU scholarships, or ready to start saving on everyday purchases, we'd love to connect. Reach out to learn more about our mission, or discover the full story behind the platform.

## Built on Legacy, Powered by Community Pride — HBCU Yard Pass

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: HBCU Yard Pass was born from culture, Homecoming energy, and a mission to drive economic empowerment across every HBCU campus and community nationwide. Learn our story!

Built on Legacy, Powered by Community Pride — HBCU Yard Pass






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Features
- About



Contact


















Our Mission



## Where Legacy MeetsEveryday Empowerment


The HBCU Yard Pass was built to honor what HBCUs have always represented — excellence, community, and the power of shared purpose. We exist to merge cultural pride, lifestyle access, and financial empowerment into one shared membership experience, giving every student, alumnus, faculty member, and family a way to live the legacy while building real economic strength.


From Homecoming weekend to everyday essentials, from football classics to family vacations, the Yard Pass connects the entire HBCU ecosystem to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide. It's not just a savings platform — it's a community investment tool that funds scholarships, supports HBCU institutions, and celebrates the culture that defines us.







### Honoring legacy. Delivering value. Building community — one pass at a time.





















HBCU Yard Pass — Connecting the Ecosystem





















Our Community

## One Yard. Every Generation.


The HBCU Yard Pass connects every corner of the HBCU ecosystem — from freshman orientation to golden alumni reunions — around a shared cultural identity, collective pride, and real everyday value.










01



### Legacy & Pride


The HBCU experience is built on something deeper than a diploma — it's a living legacy of excellence, resilience, and cultural power. From the drumline's first beat at Homecoming to the thunder of a classic-weekend crowd, every tradition carries the weight of generations who came before. The HBCU Yard Pass honors that legacy by making it tangible. When you use your pass, you're not just saving money — you're investing in the institutions, the culture, and the community that shaped who you are. Every swipe is a salute to the yard.


Homecoming
Greek Life
Step Shows
Football Classics















02



### Connection Across Generations


The HBCU Yard Pass is built for the entire ecosystem — students discovering their purpose on campus, alumni carrying the torch in their careers, faculty and staff who dedicate their lives to the mission, Greek organizations that keep traditions alive, and families who sacrifice everything to make the dream real. Whether you're a freshman walking the yard for the first time or a 40-year alumnus returning for reunion weekend, the pass meets you where you are. This is a community investment tool that bridges generations and strengthens the bonds that make HBCU culture unlike anything else in the world.


- Students & Faculty

- Alumni & Families

- Greek Organizations

- Supporters & Partners









03



### Everyday Value for the Community


Pride is powerful — and now it pays. The HBCU Yard Pass connects members to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide, delivering real savings on dining, travel, shopping, entertainment, and the everyday purchases you already make. Log in to the interactive web portal, search local or national merchants, and start saving instantly. Whether you're planning a family vacation, dining out after the game, or shopping online between classes, your pass works everywhere you go. The program transforms community loyalty into financial empowerment, so every dollar you spend does double duty — saving you money while supporting HBCU institutions and scholarships.


Get Your Yard Pass






Dining



Travel



Shopping



Events



























Beyond Savings

## A Community Investment Tool


The HBCU Yard Pass is more than a discount platform — it is a living, breathing investment in HBCU institutions, scholarship pathways, and the cultural legacy that defines our community. Every membership, every merchant interaction, every saved dollar flows back into the ecosystem that built us.


















01




### Support Institutions


When HBCU Yard Pass members save at participating merchants nationwide, a portion of that economic activity is channeled back to support the very institutions that shaped our community. HBCUs have long operated with fewer resources than their peer institutions — the Yard Pass helps close that gap by creating a continuous, community-driven funding stream. From infrastructure upgrades to academic program support, your membership helps keep the lights on, the doors open, and the legacy growing. This is driveline retail merchandising reimagined for the HBCU ecosystem — turning everyday purchases into institutional power.

Institutional Empowerment
















02




### Strengthen Scholarship Pathways


Access to education should never be a privilege reserved for the few. The HBCU Yard Pass is committed to strengthening scholarship pathways so that the next generation of HBCU graduates can walk across that stage without the crushing weight of financial barriers. A portion of program revenues is directed toward scholarship initiatives, merit awards, and emergency student funds at participating HBCU campuses. Students, alumni, faculty, and families who carry the Yard Pass are not just saving — they are actively funding the dreams of future scholars who will carry this legacy forward.

Student Financial Empowerment
















03




### Promote Culture and Leadership


HBCU culture is not background noise — it is the heartbeat of a movement. Homecoming weekends, football classics, step shows, Greek-letter pageantry, and the bonds formed on the yard are traditions worth preserving and amplifying. The Yard Pass invests in cultural initiatives, community visibility campaigns, and leadership development programs that celebrate what makes HBCU life extraordinary. By connecting the entire HBCU ecosystem — students, alumni, faculty, Greek organizations, and families — the platform ensures that our culture is not just remembered, but resourced, elevated, and passed down with pride to every generation that follows.

Cultural Legacy & Leadership
























“



## Every Membership Is an Investment in the Future of HBCU Excellence.






The HBCU Yard Pass is more than savings — it is a living declaration of community, legacy, and collective advancement. When you join, you connect to a nationwide network that funds scholarships, uplifts institutions, and celebrates the culture that defines us. Whether you are a student stepping onto campus for the first time, an alumna representing your letters at Homecoming, or a family member cheering from the stands at a football classic, your membership powers something far greater than a discount. It powers the next generation of HBCU excellence.





Get Your Yard Pass



Partner With Us





— HBCU Yard Pass  •  Celebrating Legacy. Building Futures.

Get In Touch



## Let's Connect & Build Something Bigger


Whether you're a prospective member ready to unlock exclusive savings, an HBCU institution exploring partnership opportunities, a Greek organization looking to extend benefits to your chapter, or a corporate brand wanting to reach the HBCU community — this is where the conversation starts.


Use this page for general questions, participation interest, and partnership conversations. We're here for all of it.



- ### Students & Alumni Join the Yard Pass community and start saving on everyday purchases, travel, dining, and more.

- ### Schools & Institutions Explore how HBCU Yard Pass can support your campus community, scholarships, and cultural initiatives.

- ### Greek Organizations Bring the benefits of the Yard Pass to your fraternity, sorority, or council members nationwide.

- ### Corporate & Brand Partners Connect your brand with the HBCU ecosystem and reach tens of thousands of engaged, loyal members.

Participating

## We Welcome Everyone in the HBCU Ecosystem


Whether you're a student, alumni, institution, or community partner, the HBCU Yard Pass platform is built for collaboration. Reach out — there's a place for you here.














### Membership Interest


Ready to access tens of thousands of nationwide discounts and celebrate your HBCU pride while saving on everyday purchases? Contact us to learn how to enroll in the HBCU Yard Pass and start experiencing real lifestyle savings today.

Learn About Membership











### School & Organization Participation


HBCUs, Greek organizations, student associations, and faculty groups can partner with us to bring financial empowerment directly to their communities. We support scholarships, cultural initiatives, and Homecoming programming as a community investment tool.

Partner With Us











### Corporate & Community Partnerships


Businesses and community organizations looking to reach the HBCU market can join our growing merchant network. Connect with students, alumni, and families across America while supporting a movement built on legacy, culture, and economic empowerment.

Explore Partnerships

The HBCU Yard Pass connects students, alumni, faculty, Greek organizations, and families to a powerful nationwide savings network — while investing in scholarships, cultural initiatives, and the legacy that makes HBCU culture truly extraordinary. When you save, your community grows stronger.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Features
- About



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/27/2026



HBCU Yard Pass ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: HBCU Yard Pass

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice









Unlock exclusive membership benefits and lifestyle savings crafted for the HBCU community. Your pass to more — every day.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Features
- About



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 27, 2026



HBCU Yard Pass is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: HBCU Yard Pass

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









Unlock exclusive membership benefits and lifestyle savings crafted for the HBCU community. Your pass to more — every day.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Features
- About



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 27, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - HBCU Yard Pass

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Membership Benefits & Lifestyle Savings provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


HBCU Yard Pass provides Membership Benefits & Lifestyle Savings through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by HBCU Yard Pass. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties
